station_address: Marve Rd, Malad, Kharodi Village, Malad West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400095
text:
Very bad experience 😞
I had to wait for a very long time to get CNG for my car. My car was standing in the queue for a long time, but the service was extremely slow. There was poor queue management and a lot of time was wasted. Overall, a very disappointing experience. …

station_address: Marve Rd, Malad, Kharodi Village, Malad West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400095
text: This is one of the CNG centres I drive to fill my car. This is one of the less crowded station as it is situated around 1 kms inside from oberoi signal highway. The pressure is usually ok but sometimes it sucks. This gas station is need of the place and there is no such station till Borivali highway if you want to drive from here. Staff behaviour is ok but not organised in a proper manner.
